返回本批次

DeployTarot.com – 用于部署的塔罗牌解读

DeployTarot.com – Tarot card reading for deployments

deploytarot.com 作者 rembish 分数 181 评论 53 2026/03/27 04:53
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. ✦ ✦ ✦ 今天您寻求什么建议？阿卡纳并不关心你的冲刺速度。它们只是照亮了道路——偶尔也照亮了尽头的悬崖。
  2. ❧ 您努力的本质 ❧ 您今天想交付什么？
  3. ⇌ A/B 测试 两个版本。一位获胜者。关于哪个指标重要的零共识。 ◑ 人工智能集成我们正在添加人工智能。没有人决定去哪里。这显然没问题。 ⊳ API 发布合同变更。每个客户都会在不同的时间发现。 ⊞ Config Change 是一个环境变量。这绝对不是代码。 ⚗ 数据库迁移 接触数据库。卡牌们都在看着呢。 ⛓ 依赖项更新 碰撞版本并祈祷不会出现任何问题。 ⊘ 弃用 删除肯定没有活跃用户的东西。确实。 ⚐ 功能标志 它已经在产品中。你只是还没有告诉任何人而已。 ⚜ 完整发布全部内容。变更日志和一切。 ⊕ GDPR 合规法律部门了解数据管道的作用。现在有文书工作了。 ⚑ 生产中的修补程序 它已经着火了。你现在只是负责控制火势。 ⚙ 基础设施变更 Terraform 适用。说再见。 ◉ IPO 钟声敲响。市场开放。愿上帝帮助我们所有人。 ☽ Just Vibes 票据上写着“杂项改进”。 ✨ 新功能 一些不存在的东西。现在可能会了。 ⚖ 性能优化 使其更快，可能首先会使其变得更糟。 ☰ 公共文档发布 必须有人来写。明天会有人纠正。 ⚡ 快速修复一个错误。两行。可能会出什么问题。 ◈ 品牌重塑 我们不会改变任何东西。只是名字。还有标志。还有语气。 ✏ 重新设计 不碰任何东西，改变一切。视觉上。 ♻ 重构 没有新功能。承诺。只是一个小的重组。 ↩ 回滚 我们要回去了。卡片想知道我们为什么继续前进。 🔒 安全补丁 CVE 不会自行修复。 ◎ SEO优化 算法奖励勇敢者。大概。
  4. ✦
  5. ❧ 您在此事中的角色 ❧ 您在此部署故事中是谁？

Original Summary

  1. ✦ ✦ ✦ What do you seek counsel on today? The Arcana do not care about your sprint velocity. They merely illuminate the path — and occasionally the cliff at its end.
  2. ❧ The Nature of Your Endeavour ❧ What are you trying to ship today?
  3. ⇌ A/B Test Two versions. One winner. Zero consensus on which metric matters. ◑ AI Integration We're adding AI. Nobody has decided where. That is apparently fine. ⊳ API Release The contract changes. Every client finds out at different times. ⊞ Config Change It is one environment variable. It is definitely not code. ⚗ DB Migration Touching the database. The cards are watching. ⛓ Dependency Update Bumping versions and praying nothing breaks. ⊘ Deprecation Removing something that definitely has no active users. Definitely. ⚐ Feature Flag It is already in prod. You just have not told anyone yet. ⚜ Full Release The whole thing. The changelog and everything. ⊕ GDPR Compliance Legal found out what the data pipeline does. There is paperwork now. ⚑ Hotfix in Production It is already on fire. You are just managing the fire now. ⚙ Infrastructure Change Terraform apply. Say your goodbyes. ◉ IPO The bell rings. The market opens. God help us all. ☽ Just Vibes The ticket says 'miscellaneous improvements.' ✨ New Feature Something that didn't exist. Now it might. ⚖ Performance Optimisation Making it faster, probably by making it worse first. ☰ Public Doc Release Someone has to write it. Someone else will correct it tomorrow. ⚡ Quick Fix One bug. Two lines. What could go wrong. ◈ Rebranding We're not changing anything. Just the name. And the logo. And the tone. ✏ Redesign Touch nothing and change everything. Visually. ♻ Refactor No new features. Promise. Just a small restructure. ↩ Rollback We are going back. The cards would like to know why we went forward. 🔒 Security Patch The CVE isn't going to fix itself. ◎ SEO Optimisation The algorithm rewards the brave. Probably.
  4. ✦
  5. ❧ Your Role in This Matter ❧ Who are you in this deployment story?

评论（默认中文）

fraywing 2026/03/27 07:58
> 技术债务如此之深且如此正常化，以至于团队根本不再将其视为债务。这只是“系统如何运作”。链条变得舒适了。您即将添加更多内容。

这个疼啊

> The technical debt so deep and so normalized that the team has stopped seeing it as debt at all. It's just "how the system works." The chains have become comfortable. You are about to add more.

This one hurt.

在 HN 中查看
lta 2026/03/27 08:24
听起来像OpenClaw的代码哈哈
Sounds like the code of OpenClaw haha
在 HN 中查看
dgrin91 2026/03/27 06:27
绝对棒极了。有几次我真的笑出了声。

我唯一的建议是缩短随机播放动画。起初，当我单击它并感到担心时，我以为您实际上正在做一些服务器工作。

另外，如果你在现实生活中出售这些，我也会购买它们。

Absolutely fantastic. I actually laughed out loud a few times.

My only suggestion is make the shuffle animation shorter. At first I thought you were actually doing some server work when I clicked it and got concerned.

Also if you sell these in real life I would buy them.

在 HN 中查看
rembish 2026/03/27 04:53
我们的办公室女士可以在周五部署一项新功能吗？如果我们的首席执行官进行品牌重塑怎么办？我们的实习生即将修复生产中的bug，可以吗？卡片会回答。完全愚蠢的网页，具有合理的、完全确定性的结果。 GHA、GCP，一个愚蠢的想法和很多让它变得有趣的意愿。
Can our office lady deploy a new feature on Friday? What if our CEO will do rebranding? Our intern is about to bugfix production, is it fine? Cards will answer. Totally silly webpage with reasonable, fully deterministic results. GHA, GCP, one silly idea and a lot of will to make it funny.
在 HN 中查看
PaulHoule 2026/03/27 05:05
我的塔罗小组中的人对法学硕士能否获得良好的读数持怀疑态度，但我想说副驾驶大多得出了与我相同的结论。 事实上，我有点尴尬的是，副驾驶可以主要根据卦名来解释《易经》，并且无论我使用我的袖珍威廉或我俗气的新时代翻译还是我时尚的青铜时代翻译，它看起来都比我看起来容易得多。
People in my tarot group are skeptical that you get can good readings with LLMs but I’d say Copilot mostly comes to the same conclusions that I do. I am actually a little embarrassed that Copilot can interpret the I Ching primarily based on the names of the hexagrams and makes it look a lot easier than I make it look no matter if I use my pocket Wilhelm or my cheesy new age translation or my fashionable Bronze Age translation.
在 HN 中查看

mcmoor 2026/03/27 08:14
等等，确定性的？我认为它会随机洗牌，然后让 LLM 从中构建叙事？
Wait, deterministic? I thought it shuffled random cards and then have LLM construct narrative out of that?
在 HN 中查看
dijksterhuis 2026/03/27 08:31
> 您收到的判决——“发货”、“小心行事”或“中止任务”——源自您的角色、意图和当前日期的确定性哈希值。用技术术语来说，它是一个披着斗篷的种子伪随机数。

https://deploytarot.com/disclaimer

> The verdict you receive — Ship It, Tread Carefully, or Abort Mission — is derived from a deterministic hash of your role, intent, and the current date. It is, in technical terms, a seeded pseudo-random number dressed in a cloak.

https://deploytarot.com/disclaimer

在 HN 中查看
mcmoor 2026/03/27 12:23
啊谢谢我错过了那部分。所以它是确定性的和（伪）随机的。
Ah thanks I missed that part. So it IS deterministic and (pseudo-)random.

cm2012 2026/03/27 05:30
我也有类似的想法！ https://actuarialfortunetelling.com/

精算算命利用您的信息为您提供有关您生活的真实预测。它由后端的真实精算数据提供支持。也内置于replit中。

哈哈，replit 为我们俩设计的方式完全相同！

I had a similar idea! https://actuarialfortunetelling.com/

Actuarial fortune telling that uses your info to give you a real predictions about your life. Its powered by real actuarial data in the back end. Also built in replit.

Lol that replit designed it the same exact way for both of us!

starkparker 2026/03/27 06:42
当我说：我知道这是一个工程师制作的，因为“清洁女工”可以参与部署，但“文档编写者”则不能参与部署时，我的舌头紧紧地贴在脸颊上
my tongue is firmly in my cheek when I say: I know an engineer made this, because "cleaning lady" can be involved in the deployment, but "docs writer" isn't

kyrofa 2026/03/27 08:29
> 卡片显示今天是星期五。他们没有忘记 2021 年的伟大星期五部署。他们也没有原谅它。

这……今天是星期四。

> The cards observe it is Friday. They have not forgotten the Great Friday Deploy of 2021. They have not forgiven it either.

It's... it's Thursday.

nine_k 2026/03/27 05:44
确实非常好：图形、颜色，当然还有深思熟虑的文字。我喜欢这些卡片使用辛酸的图像而不带有讽刺意味。
Indeed very nice: the graphics, the colors, and of course the thoughtful texts. I like how the cards use poignant imagery without being sarcastic.
在 HN 中查看
vntok 2026/03/27 05:56
> 甲板上有接待员。它还想承认，它上次与一位首席信息安全官交谈，询问了一个非常类似的问题。这些卡片没有评判性。然而，他们很善于观察，他们发现角色转变的时机值得评论。

这是 一点点 讽刺的。

> The deck acknowledges Receptionist. It would also like to acknowledge that it last spoke with a CISO asking about a very similar matter. The cards are not judgmental. They are, however, observant, and they find the timing of the role change worth a comment.

It is a little bit sarcastic.

dijksterhuis 2026/03/27 08:29
免责声明页面也非常好

> 三张大阿尔克那牌与您的实际生产事件之间的任何相似之处要么是惊人的巧合，要么是您应该重新考虑变更管理流程的信号。

the disclaimers page is really good too

> Any resemblance between a three-card Major Arcana spread and your actual production incident is either a remarkable coincidence or a sign that you should reconsider your change management process.

This is great and - something about programming has always felt adjacent to esotericism and the occult to me. Serial Experiments Lain is kind of in this vein too.
